jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Croma - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Croma. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
